# Hancock Plastering & Painting Services

> Plastering and painting contractors serving Middlesex and the Home Counties. City & Guilds certified, fixed-price quotes agreed before work starts, and no subcontractors — the same in-house team that quotes your job carries it out.

Key facts:
- Based at 3 Anderson Close, Harefield, Middlesex, UB9 6HF (UK).
- Phone: 07734 903439 — Email: hancockplasteringpainting@gmail.com
- A team of 4 City & Guilds certified plasterers and painters with 60+ years of combined experience.
- Fixed-price quotes confirmed before work starts; no surprise invoices.
- Verified on Checkatrade (20+ reviews).
- Note: cancellations made less than 48 hours before a booking incur a £100 cancellation fee.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/): Overview of plastering and painting services across Middlesex and the Home Counties.
- [Services](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services): All plastering and painting & decorating services offered.
- [Areas We Cover](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/areas): The 27 towns and areas served across Middlesex and the Home Counties.
- [Gallery](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/gallery): Photos of recent plastering, rendering and painting work.
- [About](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/about): The team, approach and qualifications.
- [Contact](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/contact): Request a free fixed-price quote.

## Services
- [Plastering](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/plastering): General plastering for walls and ceilings.
- [Skimming](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/skimming): Smooth skim-coat finishes over existing or new surfaces.
- [Rendering](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/rendering): External rendering for walls and facades.
- [Pebble Dashing](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/pebble-dashing): Pebble-dash exterior finishes and repairs.
- [Venetian Plastering](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/venetian-plastering): Polished decorative Venetian plaster finishes.
- [Floating Plaster](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/floating-plaster): Float and set plastering to level out walls.
- [Plaster Refurbishment](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/plaster-refurbishment): Restoring and refurbishing damaged or old plaster.
- [Repair & Insurance Work](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/repair-insurance): Plaster repairs including insurance-related work.
- [Interior Painting](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/interior-painting): Interior painting and decorating.
- [Exterior Painting](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/exterior-painting): Exterior and masonry painting.
- [Wallpapering](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/wallpapering): Wallpaper hanging and removal.
- [Sash Window Painting](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/sash-window-painting): Preparation and repainting of period sash windows.
- [Commercial Decorating](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/commercial-decorating): Painting and decorating for commercial premises.
- [Eco-Friendly Decorating](https://hancockplasteringpainting.co.uk/services/eco-friendly-decorating): Decorating using low-VOC, environmentally friendly products.
